steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: Each speaker tries to "hew out his conception of art" but feels his "strokes had gone awry" — and crucially, "for some reason which he could not grasp." Then they immediately turn to clarify in private.

steps.title: Match the point
steps.content:
Two ideas must both appear: (1) failure to express art coherently, and (2) not understanding why. That's choice B — "Each fails at presenting a wholly coherent vision of art but does not understand why."

  • A reverses the public/private preference
  • C adds contempt not in the text
  • D shifts to a question they can't answer (text shows they each speak
, then privately rectify).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
